title: Adapter Boundaries
content: Define clear boundary between simulation and real exchange. All methods must be simulation-only in this phase.

title: Allowed Future Methods
content: load_connection_profile, validate_permissions, build_signed_request, submit_order, cancel_order, fetch_balance, fetch_positions, fetch_order_status

title: Forbidden Current Methods
content: No real network calls, no real API keys, no real signatures, no real order submission

title: Network Transport Requirements
content: HTTPS only, TLS 1.2+, certificate pinning, request timeout, retry with backoff

title: Request Signing Requirements
content: HMAC-SHA256, timestamp validation, recvWindow parameter, canonical string construction

title: Credential Vault Requirements
content: Encrypted at rest, access control, audit logging, key rotation, no environment variables

title: Rate Limit Requirements
content: Per-endpoint limits, order rate limits, cancel rate limits, exponential backoff, cool-down

title: Cancel Safety Requirements
content: Idempotent cancel, terminal order handling, unknown order handling, audit trail

title: Reconciliation Requirements
content: Real balance fetch, real position fetch, staleness detection, mismatch handling, manual override

title: Audit Logging Requirements
content: Tamper-evident chain, external storage, retention policy, export capability

title: Human Approval Requirements
content: Multi-party approval, expiration, risk summary, cancel plan, rollback plan

title: Rollback Requirements
content: Point-in-time restore, artifact preservation, audit log continuity
